name: ACORN ENERGY, INC.
summary: Acorn Energy, Inc. (ACFN) is a holding company focused on remote monitoring and control solutions. Through its subsidiary OmniMetrix, it provides wireless monitoring and control systems for standby power generators and other industrial assets. Its products serve utilities, industrial customers, and government entities, offering real-time data and alerts to ensure asset reliability and uptime.
